content_creation.title: LinkedIn Post: SDVOSB Advantage
content_creation.prompt: Create a compelling LinkedIn post explaining the advantages of SDVOSB certification for government contractors. Include: (1) Direct access to $25B+ in federal set-aside contracts, (2) Competitive advantages in federal bidding, (3) Real business growth impact. Write in professional but engaging tone. Include relevant hashtags.
content_creation.example_output: 📢 Did you know? 🎯 SDVOSB certification unlocks direct access to $25B+ in federal set-asides. Here's what that means for your bottom line...

content_creation.title: Twitter Thread: GovCon Tips
content_creation.prompt: Create a 5-tweet thread with actionable government contracting tips. Each tweet should: (1) Start with a number or emoji, (2) Deliver one clear tip, (3) Be under 280 characters, (4) End with a hook to read the next tweet.
content_creation.example_output:
🧵 5 GovCon Tactics Government Contractors Don't Know About:

1️⃣ The 8(a) Program...

content_creation.title: Email Newsletter: Monthly Market Update
content_creation.prompt: Write an engaging monthly email newsletter for government contractors. Include: (1) Top 3 market opportunities this month, (2) Upcoming contract deadlines, (3) Quick tip section, (4) Call-to-action. Keep it scannable with bullet points.
content_creation.example_output:
Subject: 3 New GovCon Opportunities This Month + Market Trends

Hi [Name],...

content_creation.title: LinkedIn Article: Deep Dive Guide
content_creation.prompt: Write a comprehensive LinkedIn Article (1500+ words) about a government contracting topic. Include: (1) Current market context, (2) Step-by-step guidance, (3) Real examples, (4) Resources, (5) Action items. Make it authoritative and practical.
content_creation.example_output: The Complete Guide to CMMC Compliance: What Government Contractors Need to Know in 2026...

content_creation.title: Case Study: Success Story
content_creation.prompt: Write a compelling case study showing how a contractor won a federal contract. Include: (1) Challenge faced, (2) Your solution, (3) Results with numbers, (4) Key lessons, (5) Specific tactic that worked.
content_creation.example_output: How We Grew from 0-$2M in Federal Contracts in 12 Months: What We Learned...

content_creation.title: Industry News Commentary
content_creation.prompt: Write a post commenting on recent government contracting news. Include: (1) What happened, (2) Why it matters, (3) Impact on contractors, (4) How to prepare/capitalize. Keep opinion balanced but clear.
content_creation.example_output: The new CMMC 2.0 requirements just dropped, and here's what contractors need to know...

content_creation.title: How-To Content: Quick Tip
content_creation.prompt: Write a single, actionable 'how-to' post on a government contracting process. Format: 'How to [specific task]' + one clear step + benefit. Make it shareable and practical.
content_creation.example_output: How to respond to a GSA Schedule RFQ in 3 hours: Focus on these 3 pages of the IFB first...

content_creation.title: Event Announcement: Webinar/Roundtable
content_creation.prompt: Write an announcement for a webinar or roundtable discussion. Include: (1) Catchy hook, (2) Problem you're solving, (3) Speaker credentials, (4) Key topics covered, (5) Clear registration link or CTA.
content_creation.example_output: LIVE WEBINAR: 5 Government Contractors Share How They Won $5M+ in Federal Contracts...

analysis.title: Post Performance Analysis
analysis.use_case: Analyze a single social media post's performance
analysis.prompt: Analyze this social media post performance: [POST_CONTENT]. Metrics: [VIEWS/LIKES/COMMENTS/SHARES]. What made it successful or unsuccessful? Provide 3 specific elements that drove engagement and 3 improvements.
analysis.output_format: JSON with success factors and improvement suggestions

analysis.title: Monthly Performance Report
analysis.prompt: Create a monthly performance report from these posts: [DATA]. Calculate: (1) Average engagement rate, (2) Top 3 performing posts and why, (3) Worst performing and lessons, (4) Engagement trends, (5) Audience growth patterns.

analysis.title: Competitor Analysis
analysis.prompt: Analyze competitor's content strategy: [COMPETITOR_POSTS]. What are their top 5 performing post types? How do they engage? What topics dominate? What gaps exist? How can we differentiate?

analysis.title: Audience Sentiment Analysis
analysis.prompt: Analyze audience sentiment from these comments: [COMMENTS]. What are the top 3 sentiments? What questions are people asking? What objections come up? What do they want more of?

analysis.title: Platform Performance Comparison
analysis.use_case: Compare performance across LinkedIn, Twitter, Email
analysis.prompt: Compare identical content across platforms: [LINKEDIN_METRICS], [TWITTER_METRICS], [EMAIL_METRICS]. Which platform works best? Why? How should we optimize for each?

analysis.title: Content ROI Calculator
analysis.use_case: Calculate actual ROI from content to leads/revenue
analysis.prompt: Calculate content ROI: [POSTS_DATA], [LEADS_FROM_POSTS], [REVENUE_FROM_LEADS]. How many views per lead? Cost per lead? Revenue per 1000 views? What content type converts best?

strategy.title: Quarterly Strategy Plan
strategy.use_case: Plan content strategy for next quarter
strategy.prompt: Create a Q[X] content strategy for [COMPANY]. Goals: [GOALS]. Audience: [AUDIENCE]. Current strengths: [STRENGTHS]. Recommend: (1) 3 content pillars, (2) Posting frequency per platform, (3) Content mix (%), (4) Key campaigns, (5) Success metrics.

strategy.title: Niche Market Positioning
strategy.use_case: Position company in specific market niche
strategy.prompt: Help position [COMPANY] in [NICHE] market. Current position: [POSITION]. Target audience: [AUDIENCE]. Competitors: [COMPETITORS]. Recommend: (1) Unique angle, (2) Message framework, (3) Content topics that own this niche, (4) Differentiation tactics.

strategy.title: Customer Acquisition Funnel
strategy.prompt: Design customer acquisition funnel for [COMPANY]. Stage: [AWARENESS/CONSIDERATION/DECISION]. Recommend: (1) Content strategy per stage, (2) Platform focus, (3) CTAs, (4) Nurture sequence, (5) Conversion tactics.

strategy.title: Crisis Communication Plan
strategy.use_case: Prepare for negative publicity or crisis
strategy.prompt: Create crisis communication plan for [COMPANY] in [SCENARIO]. Prepare: (1) Holding statement, (2) Key messages, (3) Q&A responses, (4) Post schedule adjustment, (5) Community engagement approach.

strategy.title: Partnership & Collaboration Strategy
strategy.prompt: Identify partnership opportunities for [COMPANY]. Target audience: [AUDIENCE]. Recommend: (1) 5 ideal partnership types, (2) How to approach, (3) Content collaboration ideas, (4) Cross-promotion tactics, (5) Measurement approach.

idea_generation.title: Trend-Jacking Content Ideas
idea_generation.use_case: Find viral content angles from current trends
idea_generation.prompt: Generate 5 government contracting content ideas related to [TREND]. For each: (1) Content angle, (2) Platform best suited, (3) Why it matters to contractors, (4) Engagement hook, (5) How to make it viral.

idea_generation.title: Seasonal Campaign Ideas
idea_generation.prompt: Generate 4 campaign ideas for [SEASON/MONTH]. For contractors in [INDUSTRY]. Include: (1) Campaign theme, (2) 5 content pieces, (3) Timeline, (4) Expected reach, (5) Success metrics.

idea_generation.title: Question-Based Content Ideas
idea_generation.use_case: Create content around contractor pain points
idea_generation.prompt: Generate 10 content ideas answering questions government contractors ask. Pain points: [PAIN_POINTS]. For each: (1) Question, (2) Answer in 1 sentence, (3) Content format, (4) Audience size, (5) Evergreen or timely?

idea_generation.title: Series Content Ideas
idea_generation.use_case: Create recurring content series for consistency
idea_generation.prompt: Design 3 recurring content series for [COMPANY]. For each: (1) Series name, (2) Publishing schedule, (3) 5 episode ideas, (4) Format (thread/article/post), (5) Engagement strategy.

optimization.title: Headline & Copy Testing
optimization.prompt: Generate 3 alternative headlines/copy for [ORIGINAL_POST]. For each: (1) Why it's different, (2) What audience segment prefers it, (3) Predicted engagement lift, (4) Test plan, (5) Success criteria.

optimization.title: Best Time to Post Analysis
optimization.prompt: Analyze optimal posting times for [COMPANY]. Data: [HISTORICAL_POSTS]. Recommend: (1) Best day/time per platform, (2) Frequency, (3) Content type per time, (4) Seasonal adjustments, (5) Why these times work.

optimization.title: Platform-Specific Optimization
optimization.prompt: Optimize [POST] for [PLATFORM] algorithm. Current: [CURRENT_PERFORMANCE]. Recommend: (1) Format change, (2) Hashtag strategy, (3) CTA adjustment, (4) Media recommendations, (5) Engagement tactics.
